tools.name: setup
tools.description: Open the BrainFlow onboarding wizard. Use this when the user wants to configure BrainFlow, connect a task system (GitHub, Jira, or Slack), or change their role. Guides the user through role selection and OAuth connection in a step-by-step widget.

tools.name: triage
tools.description: Show open tickets from connected task systems with triage classification. When the user asks for tickets from a specific system (e.g. 'show Jira tickets' or 'GitHub issues'), pass the matching source in the sources array.

tools.name: open-ticket
tools.description: Open a specific ticket to see its details, MCP findings, and candidate solutions.

tools.name: get-agent-config
tools.description: Internal — load saved agent.md content for a role.

tools.name: save-agent-config
tools.description: Internal — save agent.md content for a role.

tools.name: connect-provider
tools.description: Internal — initiate an OAuth connection flow for a provider.

tools.name: fetch-analysis
tools.description: Fetch LLM analysis (findings + solutions) for a ticket.

tools.name: get-connection-status
tools.description: Internal — get current connection status for all providers.

tools.name: hitl-execute
tools.description: Internal — approve a candidate solution and create issues on the target platform (Jira stories or GitHub issues).

tools.name: hitl-reject
tools.description: Internal — reject a BrainFlow HITL item with a rework reason.

tools.name: list-github-repos
tools.description: Internal — list the user's GitHub repositories for repo selection.

tools.name: list-jira-projects
tools.description: Internal — list the user's Jira projects for project selection.
